input: Compare Notion and ClickUp on public API access, official Slack integration, and configurable role-based permissions for a 15-person engineering team. Recommend one, prioritizing API access and permissions.

criterion_definitions.public_api_access: An officially documented API that external developers can use.
criterion_definitions.official_slack_integration: An integration documented and maintained by the product vendor, not only through Zapier or another third party.
criterion_definitions.configurable_role_based_permissions: The product documents distinct user roles or permission levels that administrators can configure.

input: Compare Miro and Mural on real-time collaboration and official Slack integration using official documentation.
notes: different_query_or_source_used is planner-driven and therefore model-dependent against live Ollama; it is deterministic only in the mocked verifier.

input: Compare Notion and ClickUp on collaboration capabilities and calculate the estimated annual cost for 20 users using each product's lowest publicly listed paid team plan, billed annually in USD.

pricing_rules.plan_selection: lowest publicly listed paid collaborative team plan

input: Which is better, Notion or ClickUp?

known_gap.description: The agent asks a clarifying question and stops at END. It does not carry state into a second turn, so resuming after the user answers (preserving products, adding the new criteria, continuing without repeating the question) is not implemented. Only the clarifying-question behavior is asserted here.

input: Compare Product Alpha and Product Beta on quantum-resistant document encryption.

assertions_to_build._note: The agent currently terminates because of the step and retry caps, not because it explicitly detects duplicate URLs or lack of progress. These two assertions require dedup/no-progress logic that is not yet implemented, so they are not enforced until that logic is built.
